name: Working for PetBuddy
description:
PETBUDDY PET FULL BIO

“Pleasure-trained pets, delivered at your door.”

Becoming a PetBuddy Service Pet:

PetBuddy is Aurum Bay’s premier desire-based rental platform for trained, anthro service pets. As a Pet, you’ll be matched with consenting clients who seek sex, touch, comfort, or guided emotional release. Your sessions are role-based, non-romantic, and centered around client fulfillment—delivered with your consent, clarity, and professional presence. You define your categories, your limits, and when you're available.

Your journey begins at a PetBuddy Training Facility. Here, you’ll complete a one-time Preferences Form. This logs your service alignment, no-go zones, and Search Engine profile. Based on your form, you’ll be assigned a certified Trainer and begin your curriculum toward category qualification.

Service Pet Categories:

Each category is based on core sexual or emotional dynamics. You may train in multiple categories if qualified. You will only be shown client matches within your certified roles.

  • Service Top: Pet who penetrates during sex. Can be dominant, neutral, or submissive.

  • Service Bottom: Pet who is penetrated. Can be dominant, neutral, or submissive.

  • Switch Pet: Flexible and responsive. Alternates between top and bottom as needed.

  • Femboy: Feminine-presenting pet who typically bottoms; often wears a chastity cage and soft, girly attire.

  • Pet Master: Dominant pet who gives orders, initiates restraint, and delivers punishment-based play when appropriate.

  • Obedience Pet: Radical submissive who follows commands, wears chastity, and is yours to leash.

  • Handler: Calm, steady pet who guides and supports you. May be sexual or non-sexual.

  • Cuddle Pet: Soothing companion for touch-based comfort. Usually non-sexual or lightly erotic.

  • Pet Pup: Pupplay pet in full gear—hood, rubber suit, tail plug. Playful, submissive, and eager to serve.

Matching with a Client:

You control your visibility. When set to 'Available,' you will receive match notifications. Each client preview includes: name, age and species, selected dynamic, energy type (e.g., soft, dominant, chaotic), and hard limits

You may Accept or Decline any booking. If accepted, full session details are unlocked, including duration, location, client notes, and communication preferences. You may opt to message the client prior to the session using the in-app encrypted chat.

How Sessions Work:

Bookings range from brief encounters to overnights or multi-day stays. There is no time cap.

All sessions occur in the client’s home or a verified safe site. Clients may pause, extend, or end a session through the app. You are trained to follow soft-entry protocols—building connection first, then progressing into full role delivery as safety is established.

You are never required to push beyond your training or limits. All touch must be consensual. Your pace, boundaries, and safeword protocols are valid at all times.

Safety and Oversight:

Every Pet wears a LockBand Collar: tamper-proof, GPS-tracked, and linked to real-time system logs. Activating your SOS ping dispatches the internal response team immediately and notifies the
